name: Spok Holdings, Inc
summary: Overview Spok, Inc., a wholly owned subsidiary of Spok Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: SPOK), is proud to be a global leader in healthcare communications. We deliver clinical information to care teams when and where it matters most to improve patient outcomes. Top hospitals rely on Spok products and services to enhance workflows for clinicians, support administrative compliance, and provide a better experience for patients. Our headquarters is located at 3000 Technology Drive, Suite 400 , Plano, Texas 7...
